# Borderless Creators

Last updated: 2026-05-03
Canonical site: https://borderlesscreators.com/

Borderless Creators is an experimental creative studio and AI-native project universe founded by Leon Chen. It explores the intersection of AI, creation, culture, media, sports, gaming, digital identity, and storytelling.

## Founder

Leon Chen
AI product marketing and GTM leader focused on AI platforms, creator ecosystems, global partnerships, and cross-cultural technology narratives.
Personal site: https://leonchen.ai/

## Primary experiments

- Neural Field: AI-powered signal discovery and news intelligence focused on AI, sports, gaming, media, and creation. Status: Live. URL: https://ainews.borderlesscreators.com/
- Digital Leon: Experiments in digital human presence, AI identity, and conversational interfaces. Status: In Lab.
- World Model Studio: Explorations around AI, simulation, world models, and future creative infrastructure. Status: In Lab.
- Manga Lab: Storytelling and visual worldbuilding experiments blending anime, mythology, AI, and culture. Status: Upcoming.

## Four territories

- Intelligence: Signals, briefs, research workflows, and news systems.
- Identity: Digital humans, AI agents, personal media, and synthetic presence.
- Worlds: Scene generation, simulation, games, and spatial storytelling.
- Stories: Manga, publishing experiments, cross-cultural narratives, and creative IP.

## Brand summary

Borderless Creators explores how AI expands creative systems across intelligence workflows, digital identity, world-building, and visual storytelling. It is an experimental creative lab, not a personal resume or blog.

## Priority pages

- Home: https://borderlesscreators.com/
- Neural Field: https://ainews.borderlesscreators.com/
- Leon Chen: https://leonchen.ai/
